name: agentic-acss-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins for building accessible React components, CSS themes, and utility classes for fpkit/acss projects

plugins.name: acss-kit
plugins.description: Generate accessible React components and CSS themes for fpkit/acss projects. Run /setup to bootstrap a new project (sass check, ui.tsx copy, starter theme). Then use /kit-add for components, /kit-create for natural-language creator mode ("primary pill button that says 'Add to cart'"), /kit-sync to bulk-install every component plus a starter theme in one command, /kit-update to safely re-copy unmodified files after a plugin upgrade, and /theme-create for themes. Run /prompt-book for a copy-paste catalogue of example prompts. No @fpkit/acss npm package required.

plugins.name: acss-utilities
plugins.description: Tailwind-style atomic CSS utility classes for fpkit/acss projects (.bg-primary, .mt-4, .sm-hide). Hyphen-prefix responsive variants — no CSS escaping needed. Pairs with acss-kit via a token-bridge. Run /utility-add to drop the bundle into your project.
